results.label: Standard — health and wellness podcast pitching supplement brand
results.output_summary: Opens naming the brand and stating the fit: audience is health-conscious skeptics who trust evidence — the brand's third-party testing and published lab results are exactly what this audience demands. 8-month personal use mentioned. Packages: mid-roll at $45 CPM, 4-episode minimum, with newsletter bonus. CTA: schedule a 20-minute call next week. 365 words. Next Step: follow up in 7 days, have ad-read-script ready.
